comment.body:
new results, tested macro forecasts and effects.
accuracy rate = 70-73% ( but keep in mind that most forecasts are still not fullfilled, and longer-term)
lagging comapred to public sources = typically 32-41% of times, my predictions came out earlier than the public available sources (institutional researches, articles, research desks... non subscription linked)
and they come out typically 56-61 days earier before the actual events, 71-78% of times

comment.body:
for the daily reversion levels... they will be adjusted for skewness and kurtosis in the future for better accuracy 
+ in the statistics now, it was bad due to the april high volatility, and certain WoR periods, where the reversion script levels perform worse:

Close within 1 sigma: 46.0% (theoretic ~68.3%)
Close within 2 sigma: 76.1% (theoretic ~95.5%)
Close within 3 sigma: 89.6% (theoretic ~99.7%)
Close within 4 sigma: 96.3% (theoretic ~99.99%)

so this must be repaired

comment.body:
risk levels statistics ("make or break" trend levels)

hold after breakout upper band = 62.9%
in case of lower band = 45.2% 
OHLC

daily trend:
breaking upper level = 95% up/close ratio, avg return +0.64%
breaking lower level up/close ratio = 11%
avg OC return = -0.88%

Next day follow-through (Close to Close):
Upper band
- if holds = 66% up next day, +0.29% avg return
- if rejects = 33% down next day,  -0.11% avg return

Lower band:
- if holds = +0.42%  avg return (bounce)
- if fails = avg -0.14% next day

the follow-thru is asymmetric: upward risk level performs very well, while lower risk level is a contrarian level
based on OHLC!

comment.body:
so in this first backtest, i fetched all the weekly and daily posts, and the centroid, upside pivot and downside pivot levels. only. 
(so reversion levels are not included)
the backtest is based on daily OHLC for now and it has accounted for volatility for margin of error.
the more prcise 5min based backtest will come too. i'm working on it
result:

Mean combined accuracy: 60.27%
Median combined accuracy: 58.33%
95% bootstrap CI to the mean: 57.62% – 62.94%
Ratio above 50%: 55.81%
Ratio above 75%: 27.91%
comment.raw_body:
